projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: v1.10.0 shipped: single-photo scan, optional flash toggle, and a reworked toe profile that traces the front foot edge in the full-resolution photo (~0.1mm per pixel, far sharper than the old 320px mask) so the five toe-tip peaks resolve even when toes touch. An urgent task is fixing a broken/stale GitHub Pages deploy Jeremy hit: a JS chunk fails to load and the live site was serving pre-v1.9.0 code.
projects.nextStep: Deploy fix in progress. Then the 10% width-station markers get drawn onto the outline visual.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: App live end-to-end. Recent: friend system, chat/discover fixes, gender/age matching filter, duplicate-message and discover-photo fixes, and full Profile + Definition descriptions on the Me screen (build 20). A task is still completing every channel and gate interpretation so nothing shows a 'not written yet' placeholder. A context-aware compatibility-scoring spec was delivered to Jeremy to review.
projects.nextStep: Both Supabase migrations applied — gender/age matching and the discover-photo fix are live on the database. Review the compatibility-scoring spec. Then finish the App Store submission: blockers, iPhone + iPad screenshots, fresh build (build 19+ carries all the recent work).

projects.name: AI Voice Agent
projects.note: Feature-complete in mock mode — foundation, dashboard, outbound campaign engine, and an interactive voice test harness all built and verified: typecheck clean, 42/42 tests pass, boots with no API keys. Try it now with 'npm run harness'. Everything buildable without external services is done. Repo: giddyuptiger/primal-agent (commit 96ded86).
projects.nextStep: Two things, both yours: (1) provisioning — Twilio + A2P 10DLC, Deepgram, TTS, Supabase, Resend, Claude key, a host (see docs/PROVISIONING.md; start the A2P registration first, it's the slowest); (2) decide the gym platform (Mindbody/F45) so the real booking adapter can be built.
